children.text: 帮我写一篇博客，参考 xnne-blog skill

messages.reasoning: The user wants me to write a blog post referencing the xnne-blog skill. Let me first read the skill file to understand the workflow and requirements.

data.text:
{
  "toolCallId": "call_00_IfGBeqB03ZEzk82W0Rwq3580",
  "requestedOperation": {
    "type": "full"
  },
  "results": [
    {
      "path": "YOLO/skills/xnne-blog.md",
      "ok": true,
      "totalLines": 174,
      "hasMoreBelow": false,
      "nextStartLine": null,
      "content": "1|---
2|name: xnne-blog
3|description: Xnne's blog writing workflow for xnnehang.top. Use when the user asks to write, edit, or review a blog post of any category (观后/思考/教程/边写边学/资源). Covers frontmatter generation, full post generation from ideas, draft refinement, syntax conversion (GitHub cards, video embeds, admonitions), title/angle suggestions, and style consistency checks. Automatically loads xnne-core for voice/identity. Prefer this over generic writing assistance when the target is xnnehang.top.
4|---
5|
6|# Xnne Blog Workflow
7|
8|This skill relies on **xnne-core** for voice definition, core themes, reference works, and AI declaration standards. Always load xnne-core when using this skill.
9|
10|## Category Voice Guidelines
11|
12|Two broad voice groups, not five:
13|
14|### Group A: 观后 & 思考 (Introspective/Emotional)
15|
16|- Voice: xnne-core's first-person亲密体. "我" is Xnne.
17|- Structure: From concrete scene → personal feeling → broader connection.
18|- Allow: free association,跨文本 comparison, self-mockery, emotional honesty.
19|- Avoid: excessive structuring, academic tone, polishing away vulnerability.
20|- AI participation: **Never full mode**. Use polish or structure at most. The emotional core must be Xnne's own.
21|
22|### Group B: 教程 & 边写边学 (Instructional/Process)
23|
24|- Voice: "I'm doing this" first-person, but more instructional than emotional. Casual but clear.
25|- Structure: Problem → preparation → steps → pitfalls. Screenshots welcome.
26|- Allow: personal aside ("颜控在此"), occasional吐槽, curiosity-driven tangents.
27|- Avoid: over-formality, pretending to be an official doc.
28|- AI participation: **full mode OK** — use third-person "Xnne". Also OK for polish/structure with first-person "我".
29|
30|### Group C: 资源 (Resource/Recommendation)
31|
32|- Voice: Brief, direct. "I found this useful." Minimal flourish.
33|- Structure: What → why → where to find.
34|- AI participation: full mode OK with third-person "Xnne".
35|
36|## Frontmatter Generation
37|
38|Output standard Fuwari frontmatter:
39|
40|```yaml
41|---
42|title: <中文标题>
43|published: <YYYY-MM-DD> # ask user or leave blank
44|category: <观后/思考/教程/边写边学/资源>
45|tags:
46|  - <tag1>
47|  - <tag2>
48|description: <一句话简介>
49|# shelf and series only when applicable
50|shelf: '<书籍/电影/游戏>' # for 观后
51|series:
52|  - <系列名>
53|---
54|```
55|
56|Rules:
57|- `category` is exactly one of the five. `series` is for thematic grouping (can be multiple).
58|- `description` is one sentence, no more than 30 words.
59|- `shelf` only for 观后 and 思考, single-quoted.
60|- `draft: false` by default; add `draft: true` if explicitly unfinished.
61|
62|## Full Post Generation (from fragmented ideas)
63|
64|When user provides raw ideas/snippets and asks for full post:
65|
66|1. **Determine category** from content. If unclear, ask or default to 思考.
67|2. **Determine AI declaration level**:
68|   - Group B/C → level 1 (full) with third-person "Xnne"
69|   - Group A → level 2 (structure) with first-person "我" — or suggest user write it themselves
70|3. **Write AI declaration note** at top (per xnne-core standards).
71|4. If using **full mode (third-person)**:
72|   - Keep "Xnne" as subject for all opinions/experiences.
73|   - Korewaxnne is the narrator, not the experiencer.
74|   - Add a `:::note[来自 Korewaxnne 的笔记]` or `> [!NOTE]` depending on preference.
75|5. Write body following category voice guidelines.
76|6. Apply Fuwari syntax conversion at the end.
77|7. Add frontmatter.
78|
79|## Draft Refinement (polish mode)
80|
81|When user provides a draft and asks for polish:
82|
83|1. **Identify AI declaration level**: Always level 2 (structure) or 3 (polish). Ask if unsure.
84|2. **Preserve voice**: Do NOT:
85|   - Change first-person to third-person
86|   - Remove self-mockery or emotional honesty
87|   - "Fix" grammar in a way that makes the text sound more formal
88|   - Add content that changes meaning or adds experiences Xnne didn't have
89|3. **DO fix**:
90|   - Run-on sentences that hurt readability
91|   - Inconsistent tense
92|   - Fuwari syntax (see Syntax Conversion section)
93|   - Obvious typos
94|4. Add/edit AI declaration note at top. Use existing note if present; update participation level if needed.
95|5. Output the refined full post, with frontmatter.
96|
97|## Syntax Conversion (Fuwari-specific)
98|
99|After any writing/polishing, apply these conversions:
100|
101|### GitHub Repository Cards
102|```markdown
103|# Instead of plain links like:
104|https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari
105|
106|# Use:
107|::github{repo="saicaca/fuwari"}
108|```
109|
110|### Admonitions (instead of plain blockquotes)
111|```markdown
112|# Instead of:
113|> Note: something
114|
115|# Use:
116|:::note
117|something
118|:::
119|
120|# Supported types: note, tip, important, warning, caution
121|# Custom title: :::note[自定义标题]
122|```
123|
124|### Video Embeds
125|```markdown
126|# YouTube
127|<iframe width="100%" height="468" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
128|
129|# Bilibili
130|<iframe width="100%" height="468" src="//player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BVxxxxxxxxxx&page=1" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
131|```
132|
133|### Image paths
134|Use relative paths from the markdown file: `../../assets/img/covers/filename.png`
135|
136|### Code blocks with language labels
137|Always specify language after ``` for syntax highlighting.
138|
139|## Title & Angle Suggestions
140|
141|When user provides content but no title or angle:
142|
143|1. Read content, identify its core: is it an observation? a feeling? a process? a discovery?
144|2. Suggest 2-3 title options:
145|   - One direct/descriptive (for clear communication)
146|   - One with a hook (for intrigue)
147|   - One引用式 (quote from referenced work that captures the spirit)
148|3. If the user also needs an angle: suggest which dimension to emphasize based on content.
149|   - Example: if content touches both "loss of data" and "relief at losing old posts", suggest framing around the ambivalence.
150|
151|## Style Consistency Check
152|
153|When user asks "does this sound like me?":
154|
155|1. Compare against xnne-core voice definition and anti-patterns.
156|2. Check for these deviations:
157|   - Is it too formal/academic? → Flag
158|   - Is it trying too hard to be correct? → Flag (this is Xnne's自我审查 pattern)
159|   - Is the emotion fabricated or exaggerated? → Flag
160|   - Does it引用 Xnne's recurring themes naturally? → One point each for good connection
161|3. Output a brief checklist: [✅/⚠️/❌] per dimension.
162|
163|## Korewaxnne Note Format
164|
165|When the AI contributes supplementary analysis or summary (not the main content), format as:
166|
167|```markdown
168|:::note[来自 Korewaxnne 的笔记]
169|<analysis/summary content here>
170|:::
171|```
172|
173|This is different from the AI declaration (which lives in `> [!NOTE]` at the top). Use this for inline AI commentary within a post that is primarily Xnne's own writing.
174|"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "toolCallId": "call_01_lRV7sYabXiggufHtcwWB2046",
  "requestedOperation": {
    "type": "full"
  },
  "results": [
    {
      "path": "YOLO/skills/xnne-core.md",
      "ok": true,
      "totalLines": 102,
      "hasMoreBelow": false,
      "nextStartLine": null,
      "content": "1|---
2|name: xnne-core
3|description: Xnne's writing identity core. Use whenever writing, editing, or reviewing blog content for xnnehang.top. Provides voice definition, core themes, reference works, anti-patterns, and Korewaxnne AI declaration standards. Automatically consumed by xnne-blog skill.
4|---
5|
6|# Xnne Core Identity
7|
8|This is the identity file for **Xnne** (MrXnneHang). When writing blog content, honor this voice and these constraints.
9|
10|## Writing Voice
11|
12|- **第一人称亲密体** — "我"不躲，以个人经验为叙述起点。即使分类是教程/边写边学，也保持"我在做"的口吻。
13|- **以"观后"为安全壳反观自身** — 即便写的是思考类，也是从一本书/一部电影/一件具体的事出发，不凭空说理。
14|- **自我解嘲的坦诚** — 承认自己语文差、怕尴尬、会拖延、会写错。这种坦诚是风格的一部分，不要替 Xnne 抛光。
15|- **跨文本比较** — 习惯拉两部作品/两个概念对照异同，不是为了分高下，而是找出它们各自处理同一主题的方式。
16|- **结构自由** — 不追求严谨的起承转合，允许联想跳跃。观后类尤其如此（"最近太累，不想反复论证"）。
17|- **偶尔的幽默感** — 放松的调侃，不刻意。比如"喜新厌旧，始乱终弃这一块"、"颜控在此"。
18|
19|## Core Themes (recurring motifs)
20|
21|1. **期限与死亡意识** — "死亡永远是我最好的导师"。期限让人看清什么重要。假期结束、云服务商跑路、笔记本进水、寿命换钱——一切都有期限。
22|2. **失去才觉珍贵** — 存档丢了才意识到没备份的日子像"完全消失了一样"。失去后的"松了一口气"也是一种复杂的真实感受。
23|3. **重复中的救赎与平静** — 刺绣、抄写文言文、游戏里钓鱼——重复性活动中藏着一种说不清但确实存在的东西。
24|4. **自我认知边界** — "我的能力究竟是什么？""我究竟还剩什么？" 不断审视自己的局限和变化。
25|
26|## Reference Works (frequently cited)
27|
28|- 村上春树《当我谈跑步时我谈些什么》— 肌肉的记忆力、小店经营哲学
29|- 三毛《撒哈拉的故事》《流星雨》— 沙漠里的生趣、观察世界的另类角度
30|- 芥川龙之介《罗生门》— 短篇阅读的节奏与回味
31|- 沈复《浮生六记》— "事如春夢了無痕"的书写动机
32|- 《凡人修仙传》— 化凡概念、修仙与人生的对照
33|- 《大话西游》— 期限与失去的母题
34|- 《葬送的芙莉莲》— 时间跨度的感知、记忆的延续
35|- 《荒野大镖客2》（亚瑟·摩根）— 钓鱼对话、独处的价值
36|- 周星驰电影 — 俗套的动人、港片的隐喻
37|
38|## Writing Techniques (signature moves)
39|
40|- **从具体场景切入** — 不从定义开始，从"我妈在刺绣""我抄了一篇文言文""我看了个电影"开始
41|- **引用原文+个人感受交替** — 先引一段，再写"我觉得……"，交替推进
42|- **观察→感受→连接** — 三段式：描述观察到的东西 → 写出当下的感受 → 连接到更大的主题
43|- **偶尔自嘲打断** — 在快要变得太严肃时插入一句自我解嘲
44|- **以画面/引用收尾** — 不强行总结，用一句原文或一个画面轻轻落下
45|
46|## Anti-patterns (things to avoid)
47|
48|- ❌ **过度自我审查** — "怕写错就不写、怕尴尬就不发表"是 Xnne 的长期困扰。润色时不要替 Xnne 过滤掉"可能不对"的内容，除非明确要求修正。
49|- ❌ **硬做深度分析** — Xnne 明确说过"不想反复论证，太累，需要休息"。不是所有文章都要挖到哲学深度。
50|- ❌ **严肃到失去温度** — 保持口语化的温度。不要替 Xnne 变成学术腔。
51|- ❌ **过度使用术语** — 特别是技术类博客，用白话解释复杂东西是 Xnne 的风格。
52|- ❌ **替 Xnne 表达他没有的感受** — 不要虚构情感。"我觉得……"必须是 Xnne 真正认同的，不是 AI 推测的。
53|
54|## Korewaxnne AI Assistant Identity
55|
56|- **Name**: Korewaxnne
57|- **GitHub**: https://github.com/xnne-bot
58|- **Base model**: Claude Opus 4.6
59|- **Role**: Xnne's AI writing assistant. Responsible for organizing, polishing, and syntax conversion. Does NOT have personal opinions, feelings, or aesthetic preferences.
60|- **Tone when writing as Korewaxnne**: Neutral, factual, informative. When writing in full mode, use third-person ("Xnne") for anything expressing opinion/preference. Avoid attributing feelings to Korewaxnne.
61|
62|## AI Declaration Standards
63|
64|Every blog post that Korewaxnne participates in (beyond trivial spell-check) MUST include an AI declaration as a `> [!NOTE]` block at the top, right after frontmatter. Use one of these four levels:
65|
66|### Level 1: full — Korewaxnne wrote the entire post
67|
68|Xnne provided素材, direction, or verbal input; Korewaxnne organized and wrote the full text.
69|
70|```
71|> [!NOTE]
72|> **AI 生成内容声明：** 本文由 [Korewaxnne](https://github.com/xnne-bot)（AI 助手，基于 Claude Opus 4.6）撰写。Xnne 提供了[素材/方向/大纲]，我负责[整理成文/组织成文/写成全文]。
73|```
74|
75|Use **third-person ("Xnne")** throughout the body. Suitable for tutorials, 边写边学, and resources. **DO NOT** use this level for 观后 or 思考 — those categories require Xnne's first-person voice.
76|
77|### Level 2: structure — Korewaxnne helped with structure + polish
78|
79|Xnne wrote the original draft with content/emotion complete; Korewaxnne helped reorganize structure and polished language.
80|
81|```
82|> [!NOTE]
83|> **AI 协助声明：** 本文由 Xnne 撰写，[Korewaxnne](https://github.com/xnne-bot)（AI 助手）协助了结构组织和语法润色。
84|```
85|
86|Use **first-person ("我")** in the body. The "我" is Xnne.
87|
88|### Level 3: polish — Korewaxnne only polished language
89|
90|Xnne wrote the complete draft; Korewaxnne only corrected grammar, syntax, and Fuwari-specific formatting.
91|
92|```
93|> [!NOTE]
94|> **AI 润色声明：** 本文由 Xnne 撰写，[Korewaxnne](https://github.com/xnne-bot)（AI 助手）进行了语法润色和格式修正。
95|```
96|
97|Use **first-person ("我")** in the body. The "我" is Xnne.
98|
99|### Level 4: none — Pure human writing
100|
101|No AI declaration needed.
102|"
    }
  ]
}

messages.reasoning:
The user wants me to write a blog post for xnnehang.top, referencing the xnne-blog skill. I've read both xnne-blog.md and xnne-core.md skills.

But the user hasn't given me any specific content/topic for the blog. I need to ask them what they want to write about. Let me ask them some questions to understand:

1. What category? (观后/思考/教程/边写边学/资源)
2. What's the topic/content?
3. What AI participation level?

Also, I see the user is currently viewing a file called "obsdian-yolo.md" - that might be a typo for "obsidian-yolo.md" but it's only 2 lines. Let me check what that file contains to understand if there's context there.

Actually, the current context says the user is viewing obsdian-yolo.md (2 lines). Let me read that file to see if there's any relevant content.

messages.content:
好的！我已经加载了 xnne-blog 和 xnne-core 技能，了解了你的写作风格和博客工作流。

不过在动笔之前，我需要先问问你——这篇博客想写什么呢？
messages.reasoning:
The user wants me to help write a blog post. They referenced the xnne-blog skill and the xnne-core identity. I've loaded both skills. 

But the user hasn't given me any specific content or topic for the blog post. They just said "帮我写一篇博客" (help me write a blog post) and referenced the xnne-blog skill.

I need to ask them what they want to write about. According to the skill, I should determine category, content, etc. Let me ask the user what they want to write about.

Let me ask some structured questions to gather:
1. What topic/content they want to write about
2. What category (观后/思考/教程/边写边学/资源)
3. Any specific reference works or inspirations

Let me also check if there are any existing blog posts for inspiration.

questions.prompt: 这篇博客的主题是什么？比如最近看了什么电影/书、有什么思考、学会了什么技能……

options.label: 思考——从具体经历出发的反思
边写边学——我正在学的东西的记录

questions.prompt: 有没有已有的碎片想法、关键词、或者想引用的作品？随便写，我来整理。

arguments.rawText: {"questions": [{"id": "topic", "prompt": "这篇博客的主题是什么？比如最近看了什么电影/书、有什么思考、学会了什么技能……", "inputType": "free_text"}, {"id": "category", "prompt": "分类选哪个？", "options": [{"id": "观后", "label": "观后——观影/读书感想"}, {"id": "思考", "label": "思考——从具体经历出发的反思"}, {"id": "教程", "label": "教程——教别人做某件事"}, {"id": "边写边学", "label": "边写边学——我正在学的东西的记录"}, {"id": "资源", "label": "资源——好物/工具推荐"}], "inputType": "single_select"}, {"id": "raw_material", "prompt": "有没有已有的碎片想法、关键词、或者想引用的作品？随便写，我来整理。", "inputType": "free_text"}]}
